ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the requirement belongs to */,
  "req_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., functional, non-functional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the requirement (e.g., Server, Client) */,
  "build" INTEGER /* Build number associated with the requirement */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case associated with the requirement */,
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the use case associated with the requirement */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the requirement */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_use_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("use_case_id") REFERENCES use_cases ("use_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, developer, tester) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "use_cases" (
  "use_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use case */,
  "use_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the use case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the use case */,
  "preconditions" TEXT /* Preconditions of the use case */,
  "postconditions" TEXT /* Postconditions of the use case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement the history entry belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the requirement */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_history_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_history_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_comments_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the attachment file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_attachments_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirement_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirement_tags_req_id FOREIGN KEY ("req_id") REFERENCES requirements ("req_id")
)
